title: VoidRod
description:
fishing rod that teleports players hooked into the void.
/voidrod give {player}
body:
VoidRod is a simple Paper/Bukkit plugin that lets admins give players a special fishing rod.

When a player hooks another player with the rod, the target is instantly teleported to:

0 -300 0

Features:
• Custom Void Rod item
• Admin command to give the rod
• Works on Paper/Bukkit/Spigot
• Supports Minecraft 1.21+

Command:
/voidrod give <player>

Permission:
OP only
